channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Cette trottinette Ninebot (80 km d’autonomie) qu’on a adorée voit son prix chuter chez Boulanger
item.description: La Ninebot Segway Max G3 E, notée 9/10 par Frandroid, passe à 799 euros au lieu de 899 euros. C'est un bon engin pour celles et ceux qui cherchent un modèle performant, capable d’offrir jusqu’à 80 km d’autonomie et un moteur puissant pour les trajets du quotidien.

item.title: Pearl Abyss is making me forget that Crimson Desert is a single-player game, with so many great updates — and it deserves all the plaudits for it
item.description: Pearl Abyss is continuously providing more updates for Crimson Desert, long after its launch, and it's incredibly impressive for a single-player game.

item.title: We just got an update about A24's Texas Chainsaw Massacre — and it gives us a huge clue about the plot
item.description: Curry Barker has teased a little about his plans for his Texas Chainsaw Massacre movie, and it's a pleasant surprise.

item.title: Companies Keep Slashing Employees’ Benefits for the Worst Reasons
item.description: Workers are getting worse health care, parental leave, and retirement benefits, showing once and for all that your job doesn’t love you back.

item.title: Sony Xperia 1 VIII : l’anti-iPhone dont la démo IA photo embarrasse jusqu’à Sony
item.description: Sony lance le Xperia 1 VIII à 1 499 euros avec jack 3,5 mm, obturateur physique et trois capteurs ZEISS. Mais c'est surtout une comparaison ratée de son IA photo sur X qui fait parler de lui.

item.title: X, a bastion for hate, claims it will reduce hate content in the UK
item.description: Ofcom says X has committed to reviewing reported posts more quickly.

item.title: Xperia 1 VIII : Sony cherche à rassurer ses utilisateurs après ses photos IA
item.description: Après une publication que l'on qualifiera poliment de bourde sur X, Sony a tenu à préciser les choses au sujet de l'apport de l'IA sur les photos prises avec le Xperia 1 VIII.

item.title: Claude Mythos turns years of security research into 20-hour AI exploits
item.description: Claude Mythos signals a shift to AI-powered cyberattacks and urgent defensive change.

item.title: Honor implies the Trump Mobile T1 is a 'Chinese-made gold phone' in playful social media jibe
item.description: Chinese smartphone brand Honor has poked fun at the Trump Mobile T1 Phone in a new social media post.

item.title: Amazon retire 320 € sur l’Asus V16, un laptop qui combine Intel Core 7, RTX 5060 et écran 144 Hz
item.description: L’Asus V16 avec RTX 5060 profite d’une belle remise sur Amazon et tombe à 1 179 euros au lieu de 1 499 euros. Cela en fait une option bien plus intéressante pour les joueurs à la recherche d’un laptop performant sans exploser leur budget.

item.title: Best Early Memorial Day Deals: Garmin, Birdfy, Breville (2026)
item.description: Memorial Day isn’t until May 26, but sales on our favorite gear have already started.

item.title: 18 top tech deals from the Amazon UK weekend sale — get up to 40% off Kindle, Bose, Ninja, Apple, and more
item.description: There are some fantastic tech deals available this weekend at Amazon UK, so I've searched through the retailer and picked out the 18 top offers I'd buy.

item.title: Proton Unlimited is on sale again, and I can't recommend it enough: email, cloud storage, a password manager and a VPN – all private, all secure and all ad-free
item.description: Proton Unlimited has got a 30% discount for a short time – it's the Big Tech alternative deal you've been waiting for.

item.title: Amazon's Memorial Day sale is better than I expected — 60% off TVs, summer essentials, appliances, mattresses, and more
item.description: Amazon's 2026 Memorial Day sale is live, and it's better than I expected with up to 60% offf appliances, TVs, summer essentials, AirPods, and more.

item.title: Guerre des puces US/Chine : le gouvernement Trump fait des concessions mais les ventes de Nvidia en Chine ne repartent pas
item.description: Une dizaine d'entreprises chinoises, listées par l'administration américaine, peuvent désormais acheter des semi-conducteurs H200 de Nvidia. Malgré ce nouveau feu vert, les ventes du champion américain ne décollent pas en raison de pressions de Pékin et de conditions imposées par Washington.

item.title: The funniest thing about the Trump arcade game is how good it is
item.description: This week, a trio of video game cabinets emblazoned with pixel art of Donald Trump and a number of other government officials' faces suddenly appeared at the DC War Memorial. Looking at the cabinets from a distance, it's easy to get the sense that Operation Epic Furious: Strait to Hell (which you can also play […]

item.title: The promises and pitfalls of personalized health
item.description: This is Optimizer, a weekly newsletter sent every Friday from Verge senior reviewer Victoria Song that dissects and discusses the latest gizmos and potions that swear they're going to change your life. Opt in for Optimizer here. A few days ago, my esthetician was smearing hot wax on my face. The two caterpillars I call […]

item.title: Runway started by helping filmmakers. Now it wants to beat Google at AI.
item.description: AI video generation startup Runway is betting that video generation is the path to world models. And that being an AI outsider is an advantage, not a liability.

item.title: 7 new movies and TV shows to watch on Netflix, Prime Video, HBO Max, and more this weekend (May 15)
item.description: Marvel's latest TV special leads this week's packed round-up of new movies, TV shows, and documentaries.

item.title: Engadget Podcast: Who needs Googlebooks?
item.description: We also dive into all the new features in Android 17.

item.title: Windows 11 bientôt beaucoup plus rapide grâce à WinUI : les premiers résultats de Microsoft sont encourageants
item.description: Microsoft a promis de rendre Windows 11 plus performant. Les équipes de la firme sont à pied d’œuvre et pour le moment, force est de constater qu'elles font du bon travail.

item.title: À seulement 360 €, ce TV QLED 144 Hz de 55″ devient très difficile à ignorer
item.description: Les téléviseurs TCL séduisent depuis longtemps par leur très bon rapport qualité-prix, et le modèle 55P8K en est un bon exemple. Grâce à la super offre du jour, ce TV 144 Hz tombe à seulement 360 euros, de quoi profiter d’une belle expérience sans se ruiner.

item.title: Somebody made a Wikipedia clone entirely hallucinated by AI. You can browse it here
item.description: Halupedia is a wiki dedicated to everything that never happened—but its infinite capabilities could create another online cesspool. As the preeminent internet encyclopedia, Wikipedia is known for having articles on every topic under the sun. From the commonplace to the esoteric, if it’s at all noteworthy in the grand scheme of the universe, it’ll have its own Wikipedia entry....

item.title: Figma changed how it charges for AI features. Its stock price just swung to a seven-week high
item.description: In March, the design software firm started enforcing AI credit limits. Now it just revealed that customers are opting to buy more after hitting their caps. With its AI credit limits officially up and running, design software maker Figma has just notched another successful quarter under its belt.

item.title: Nouvelle ligne rouge de franchie pour Netflix ? Le géant du streaming ouvre un studio d’animation IA
item.description: Le géant du streaming Netflix continue à explorer les possibilités de l'intelligence artificielle. Cette fois-ci en s'en servant pour produire du contenu animé.

item.title: « Elles sont un peu vieilles » : le chinois Xpeng tacle les usines Volkswagen mais reste intéressé
item.description: Xpeng envisage d'utiliser des usines Volkswagen sur le sol européen pour assembler ses véhicules électriques. Une nouvelle étape dans cette alliance sino-allemande qui prend de l'ampleur, mais pas forcément dans le sens que l'on pensait. Dans le même temps, d'autres constructeurs chinois lorgnent eux aussi les capacités industrielles du Vieux Continent. ...

item.title: X is fighting Andrew Tate’s attempt to unmask his critics
item.description: X is fighting for its users' right to anonymity against the far-right influencers and accused human traffickers Andrew and Tristan Tate, who are seeking to unmask their online critics. The Tate brothers filed suit against the owners of more than a dozen social media accounts - several of them run pseudonymously - last year, claiming […]

item.title: As someone that sank over 100 hours into the first game, Subnautica 2 has lived up to my expectations — but there's one crucial element I want to see before I'm totally happy
item.description: After playing Subnautica 2 for tens of hours, here are my first impressions.
